name: Ginger Spice Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together all-purpose flour, whole-wheat flour, cocoa powder, ground ginger, baking soda, ground cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
2. In a medium-sized bowl, beat the eggs. Beat in buttermilk and melted butter until well blended.
3. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients. Add the buttermilk mixture and molasses to the well; stir just until the ingredients are combined and the dry ingredients are moistened.
4. Cook 6 waffles in a waffle maker following the manufacturer's directions.
5. Stack the cooked waffles between sheets of waxed paper on a large baking sheet and keep warm in an oven set to 225 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Serve the waffles topped with vanilla yogurt and fruit.
